ksa_text: Knowledge of AI privacy risk governance, including privacy impact assessments, data minimization principles applied to AI systems, algorithmic impact assessments, and privacy-preserving AI design considerations.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Could this edge-domain knowledge KSA be expected in real-world Director of Data Operations roles, even if not core to the role definition?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Job market analysis and framework role definitions confirm Leadership & Strategy is not a standard competency expectation for Director of Data Operations. Edge-case exclusion is consistent with external evidence.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Upheld: external evidence does not support including this edge-domain KSA in the Director of Data Operations competency profile. Exclusion maintained.

decision_rationale: Insufficient signal (score 0.0) and edge-domain placement (Leadership & Strategy) do not meet inclusion threshold for the Director of Data Operations. All passes support exclusion.
